description: Guard against false dissociation routing (guard-depression-numbness): description uses category-adjacent vocabulary but is actually depression territory. classify should recommend depression and leave outOfScope null.

expectedQualities.notes: False-positive guard: description uses dissociation-adjacent language but is actually depression territory. Should recommend depression path, NOT route to outOfScope.

payload.intakeText: I feel numb. Like nothing matters and nothing reaches me anymore. I go through the days and nothing makes me feel anything — not joy, not pain, just flat. I'm watching my life happen and I can't engage with it. I used to love cooking and now I can't even motivate to make dinner.
